---
title: "Topic"
subtitle: "Lecture template, {{< var course.code >}}, {{< var course.term >}}"
date: 2025-09-09
---

# Introductions

## Teaching team

## Where to start? {.center}

Canvas: [{{< var course.lms >}}]({{< var course.lms >}})

Course Website: [{{< var course.website >}}]({{< var course.website >}})

PrairieLearn:  [{{< var course.prairielearn >}}]({{< var course.prairielearn >}})

## About This Course

## Term Schedule

## Evaluation

## Communications

## Course overview

# Section

## Learning outcomes

<!-- Because the learning outcomes are often repeated across multiple documents, they are included as a separated document -->

{{< include /_includes/learning-outcomes/_lecture-template_learning-outcomes.qmd >}}

## {{< iconify fa6-solid laptop-code >}} Example activity  {.activity}

Activity instructions

1. First step.

2. Second step.

{{< countdown minutes=10 >}}

::: notes
Presentation notes
:::
